title: Run dedup-payment-stats.ts on production before deploying the index change
body: The unique compound index on (date, currency) cannot be created if duplicate rows already exist in production. Run `pnpm tsx scripts/dedup-payment-stats.ts --execute` against the production MongoDB before deploying this change.
rationale: If duplicates exist, index creation will fail and block the deploy.

title: Monitor PaymentStats counts after deploying concurrent webhook fix
body: Watch payment_stats counts in the first hours after deploying — confirm no counts are lost and the aggregation is correct under concurrent load.
rationale: The atomic upsert changes the write path; monitoring confirms the fix works in production.
